title: Bond and repair fibreglass components
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Bond and repair fibreglass components demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan the job

pcs.text: Items to be bonded and repaired are identified from work orders1.2 FRP materials and equipment are identified, selected and prepared1.3 Component surface area is calculated and FRP materials are prepared1.4 Required quantities of gel-coat, resins, catalyst and matting are calculated1.5 Correct set-up and facilities of ventilated work area are confirmed and faults and non-compliances are reported

elements.title: Bond and repair components
